content.question: The long-term sustainability and outcomes of fenntartóváltás (maintainer-change) to church and civic organizations are not systematically tracked; it is unclear whether such schools remain viable, maintain educational quality, meet transparency and non-discrimination standards, and sustain community participation over 10+ years.
content.reduction_path: A longitudinal administrative dataset tracking feladatellátási helyek by maintainer-type (state, church, civic, other) over 10+ years, including enrollment trends, pedagogical outcomes (if measured), financial stability indicators, and governance transparency metrics.
